claims.claim: Employment (Equal Opportunities) Law 5748-1988 prohibits Israeli employers from discriminating in hiring based on age, gender, race, religion, marital status, parental status, sexual orientation, political affiliation, or reserve duty. The protected grounds are enumerated in Section 2 (סעיף 2) of the law, expanded by amendments to include place of residence (מקום מגורים, Amendment 22, 2014), country of origin, nationality, pregnancy, and fertility treatments.
claims.raw_snippet: https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Employment_(Equal_Opportunities)_Law,_1988 Employment (Equal Opportunities) Law, 1988 prohibits discrimination in employment based on sex, sexual orientation, personal status, pregnancy, fertility treatments, parenthood, age, race, religion, nationality, country of origin, place of residence, worldview, political party affiliation, or duration of reserve service

claims.claim: The Employment (Equal Opportunities) Law has been amended multiple times since 1988, expanding the list of protected characteristics to include sexual orientation, fertility treatments, and parenthood among others.
Section 2(c) of Law 5748-1988 permits differential treatment necessitated by the character or nature of the assignment or post (a BFOQ-style carve-out).
claims.raw_snippet: Differential treatment necessitated by the character or nature of the assignment or post shall not be regarded as discrimination

claims.claim: Official English text of Employment (Equal Opportunities) Law 5748-1988 hosted on icj.org.
Nevo legal database hosts the Hebrew text of Equal Opportunities Law at p214m1_001.htm.
Nefesh B'Nefesh publishes Israeli resume dos-and-don'ts guidance for olim chadashim.
JobMob blog hosts a guide on translating foreign resumes to the Israeli CV format.
Anglo-List publishes Israeli resume guidance on tone, length, and section order for English-speaking olim.
Israeli mobile phone numbers in international format use +972 country code without the leading zero (e.g., +972-50-123-4567); domestic format keeps the leading zero (050-123-4567).
Unit 8200 is the Israel Defense Forces Intelligence Corps signals-intelligence unit.
claims.raw_snippet: Unit 8200 ... Intelligence Corps of the Israel Defense Forces
